top_signals.title: Stocks Climb, Oil Falls on US-Iran Talks Report: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose as a decline in oil prices halted a selloff in bonds, with traders awaiting Nvidia Corp.’s results for clues on whether a tech-led surge from 2026 lows has more room to run.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Three supertankers attempt Strait of Hormuz crossing
top_signals.summary: Vessels bound for China and South Korea are carrying 6mn barrels of crude oil
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Something very unusual is happening with Nvidia options
top_signals.summary: Ahead of earnings, NVDA's short-dated calls are trading at a premium to puts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nvidia must ‘step up to the plate’ after $1.5 trillion rally
top_signals.summary: The world’s most valuable listed company is expected to report another surge in sales and profits after the US market closes, with Wall Street forecasting quarterly revenue approaching $79bn (£58.9bn). But investors are increasingly questioning how long Nvidia can sustain growth at its current pace after the stock added more than $1.5tn in market value [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China sets new mining controls, to fast-track strategic reserve buildout
top_signals.summary: Stricter rules including security reviews on foreign investments in the Chinese mining sector are set to take effect on June 15.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU opens MiCA consultation to review if crypto framework is still fit for purpose
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
